apps.name: OpenCut
apps.description: Edit videos with a browser-native timeline, media tools, effects, and export controls.
apps.capabilitySummary: Requests project file access, shared-file read access, file picker access, and notifications.

apps.name: Moodboard
apps.description: Collect images on a pannable canvas and arrange visual references.
apps.capabilitySummary: Requests project file access, shared-file read/write access, file picker access, notifications, and host navigation.
